---
title: "Services"
---

## Assessment & Psychometrics

- Item analysis
- Form analysis
- DIF/fairness analyses
- Equating
- Standard setting
- Validity evidence
- Technical reports
- Documentation
- Assessment program review

For credentialing, licensing, certification, education, and assessment programs that need defensible analyses and clear technical documentation.

## R, Shiny, & Reproducible Tools

- Shiny dashboards
- Decision-support apps
- Quarto reports
- R package development, deployment, and support
- Workflow automation
- Code review and refactoring
- Reproducible reporting pipelines

Building tools that help teams repeat analyses, explain results, and make decisions without relying on fragile spreadsheet workflows.

## Operations & Planning Models

- Break-even modeling
- Capacity planning
- Pricing scenarios
- Service-line planning
- Forecasing/sensitivity analysis
- Interactive planning tools

For new or small service-based businesses planning for their future.

## Engagement Types

- Focused analysis project
- Technical report or documentation
- Prototype Shiny app
- Ongoing analytics support
- Code/workflow review
- Advisory consultant

## Call to Action

Have a measurement, analytics, or decision-tool problem? [Let's talk.](contact.qmd)
